notes: Starter dinner library focused on low-cost, stretchable meals with gluten-free and dairy-free options for Angel plus flexible gluten/dairy options for the rest of the household.

dinners.name: Rice Bowls
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Use gluten-free labeled beans/salsa and keep toppings dairy-free.
dinners.household_notes: Others can add cheese, sour cream, or regular sauces if wanted.
dinners.prep_notes: Freeze cooked rice flat in bags and portion beans separately.

dinners.name: Potato Hash
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Naturally gluten-free and dairy-free if cooked with oil and safe seasonings.
dinners.household_notes: Good picky-friendly base because toppings can be added separately.
dinners.prep_notes: Roast or par-cook diced potatoes ahead, then reheat in a skillet.

dinners.name: Bean Chili
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Use lentils/beans with celiac-safe labeling and no wheat/milk facility advisory.
dinners.household_notes: Others can add cheese or crackers separately.
dinners.prep_notes: Freeze in single portions or use as a topping for potatoes and rice.

dinners.name: Fried Rice
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Use gluten-free tamari if adding soy-sauce flavor; otherwise season with salt, garlic, onion, and acid.
dinners.household_notes: Can be made plain for picky eaters and sauced individually.
dinners.prep_notes: Best with chilled or frozen cooked rice.

dinners.name: Loaded Baked Potatoes
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Keep Angel toppings dairy-free; use chili/beans that are confirmed gluten-free.
dinners.household_notes: Others can add cheese, sour cream, or bacon bits if available.
dinners.prep_notes: Bake extra potatoes and reheat throughout the week.

dinners.name: Lentil Tomato Pasta
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Use gluten-free pasta and safe lentils for Angel's portion.
dinners.household_notes: Use cheaper regular pasta for the boys and keep sauce separate if needed.
dinners.prep_notes: Make one sauce and serve over separate pasta types.

dinners.name: Chicken Rice Soup
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Use gluten-free bouillon and no dairy.
dinners.household_notes: Serve with regular bread/crackers separately for anyone who wants them.
dinners.prep_notes: Cook a big pot and freeze in single-serving containers.

dinners.name: Cabbage Taco Bowls
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Use corn tortillas and gluten-free seasonings for Angel.
dinners.household_notes: Flour tortillas can be used for egg wraps or burritos for the boys.
dinners.prep_notes: Batch cook taco meat stretched with beans or safe lentils.

dinners.name: Chickpea Curry-ish Skillet
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Naturally gluten-free/dairy-free if chickpeas and seasonings are safe.
dinners.household_notes: Keep spice level mild and add heat individually.
dinners.prep_notes: Freeze as rice skillet dump bags or sauce portions.

dinners.name: Egg and Bean Breakfast Tacos
dinners.angel_safe_notes: Angel said they will not eat the egg wraps, so these can be made with gluten tortillas for others if kept separate.
dinners.household_notes: Good freezer wrap option for the boys; use flour tortillas if cheaper.
dinners.prep_notes: Freeze wrapped individually with salsa served on the side after reheating.
